attacking_style: Targets intermediate KOM sprints opportunistically in breakaways, showing tactical maturity to time efforts and shed competitors deliberately at key moments rather than racing for stage wins.
team_tactics: Appears to be given freedom to hunt secondary classifications (KOM jersey) in early Grand Tour stages, suggesting team trust in young rider's tactical acumen.
terrain_preference: Intermediate categorized climbs where KOM points are available; tactical positioning rather than summit finishes. Thrives in breakaway scenarios on rolling terrain.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify clear weaknesses; as a 22-year-old GT debutant, sustained three-week racing and defense against dedicated climbers remains untested.
key_patterns: Tactically sophisticated for age: controlled KOM competition methodically on GT debut at 22.
Prioritizes secondary objectives over stage hunting: deliberately shed competitors for jersey security.
Early-stage opportunism: targeted first GT road stage to establish classification position.
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated precocious tactical intelligence winning KOM jersey on Grand Tour debut as young rider
